series_metadata.series_description: This retention schedule consists of records related to the cemetery grant program, which include, but are not limited to the following: cemetery grant applications, documentation included with the application, award letters, final reports filed with the Division and any related correspondence.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: Paper records are imaged and indexed into a machine readable format. Upon confirmation that paper record was imaged and indexed properly ; Electronic: Any records maintained in machine readable format are be retained from date final accounting report is filed with Division. , any machine readable records are be deleted. ; Microform: Any records maintained in microform are be retained from date final accounting report is filed with Division. , any microform records are be shredded
retention_rules.disposition_method: Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete ; Microform: Shred
